page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmg5.24xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server from the ecs.ebmg5 family. It features 96 dedicated physical cores and 96 vCPUs, utilizing a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration with dedicated CPU allocation. The system is equipped with 384.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

This server operates on the KVM hypervisor and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps. It does not include bundled local storage, requiring external block storage solutions for data persistence. There are no integrated GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses included with this configuration.

Given the dedicated CPU allocation and 1:1 physical-to-virtual core mapping, this instance offers high resource density and predictable compute performance. The qualitative cost profile reflects its high-end hardware class, suitable for enterprise-grade workloads that demand consistent CPU execution without hyperthreading interference. Appropriate workloads include large-scale web serving, general-purpose enterprise applications, database hosting, and containerized microservices.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmg5.24xlarge is a dedicated x86_64 server instance featuring 96 physical cores and 96 vCPUs, operating with a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio. It is equipped with 384.0 GB of system memory, establishing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. Running on the KVM hypervisor, the instance delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, relying on external network-attached storage for data persistence. With dedicated CPU allocation and a 1:1 core-to-thread mapping, this server provides highly predictable compute performance. It is designed for resource-intensive enterprise applications, large-scale web serving, database hosting, and general-purpose workloads requiring consistent processing power without hyperthreading overhead.
